metadata.description: SDLC toolkit — scaffolding, git workflow, security scanning, QA, code review, and UI/UX design system with 5 agents and 8 skills

plugins.name: sprintt-dev
plugins.description: Complete SDLC toolkit for Sprintt projects. Scaffolding, conventional commits, PR creation, security scanning, QA checks, code review, component generation, and brand identity management. Includes agents: @security, @qa, @reviewer, @architect, @designer.
